math_recheck: Re-derived every load-bearing equation against the Bogoliubov 1947 primary scan (eqs 2,4,5,6,6',7,8,9,10,11,13,15,16,17,18,26,27 read visually); verified the 2x2 eigenvalue E=sqrt(T^2+2T(N0/V)v), the canonical-transform commutator, u^2-v^2=1, the depletion integrand equals Bogoliubov eq(27) (numerically identical to v_f^2), the P/sound-speed chain c^2=v(0)/(mv)=dP/drho, and ran the answer.md and code/ scripts (c=0.1, Vc=0.1, depletion 3.4e-3, depletion closed form matches the numeric v_k^2 integral to 5 sig figs).
fixes: reasoning.md:15 field split was Psi=a_0/(V*sqrtV)+theta (extra factor of V, also self-contradicting the very next clause) -> corrected to the primary's Psi=a_0/sqrtV+theta
reasoning.md:20 EOM for the excited field omitted the load-bearing local term (N0/V)Phi_0*theta from primary eq(2) -> added it so the E_0 phase-strip is actually justified

reasoning.md:21 condensate phase had wrong exponent sign a_0=e^{+iE_0 t/hbar}b (ihbar d a_0/dt=E_0 a_0 requires e^{-iE_0 t/hbar}) -> corrected to e^{-iE_0 t/hbar} and rewrote the de-phasing logic to show the local E_0 term cancels with the phase, leaving diagonal T(f)+(N0/V)v(f)
caveat: No author self-account exists for Bogoliubov 1947 (absent from SELF_ACCOUNT_SOURCES.md, not found in search); path reconstructed from the unusually narrative primary plus antecedents, as noted in notes/synthesis.md. All other load-bearing facts verified against the retrieved primary.
